channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ backs down in legal fight with law firms Trump targeted
item.description: The Department of Justice moved to dismiss its civil case against four leading law firms that won rulings against President Trump's executive orders t...

item.title: Iran targets U.S. allies, hits American Embassy in Riyadh
item.description: The U.S. Embassy in Riyadh was attacked by two drones, according to initial estimates, resulting in a limited fire and minor material damage to the bu...

item.title: Rubio's war remarks blow open MAGA's Israel divide
item.description: MAGA's ascendant "America First" wing erupted after Secretary of State Marco Rubio effectively blamed Israel for drawing the U.S. into war with Iran. ...

item.title: Inside the $64 million midterm civil war infuriating Democratic Party leadership
item.description: An expensive Democratic civil war is brewing this election cycle, with a staggering 30 House Democrats facing at least one primary challenger who has ...

item.title: Trump says he'll end White House Correspondents' Dinner boycott and attend this year
item.description: President Trump on Monday confirmed he will be accepting an invitation to this year's White House Correspondents' Dinner. Why it matters: Trump never ...

item.title: Justice Dept. abandons defense of orders targeting law firms
item.description: President Donald Trump’s executive orders imposing sanctions on several law firms had been struck down by judges. His administration is abandoning its...

item.title: How Trump assassination attempts played into his decision to attack Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump acknowledged for the first time a personal rationale for attacking Iran: “I got him before he got me.”

item.title: White House offers shifting rationales for war with Iran
item.description: From regime change to nuclear weapons, preemption to ballistic missiles, Trump’s top aides are retroactively making a broad case for a war of the pres...

item.title: Supreme Court sides with Christian parents in battle over school trans policies
item.description: At issue is a California law prohibiting school policies that require employees to report students’ sexual orientation and gender identity to parents.

item.title: What Tuesday’s big midterm contests will reveal about Trump and Democrats
item.description: New congressional maps will debut in Texas and North Carolina as Republicans try to defend their majorities and Democrats hope they can flip both cham...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
